description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On Feb 5, 2025 at 06:31 PM PT, the blind spot sensor pod of our autonomous vehicle (AV) made contact with a parked passenger car on 
2132 Kingsbury Cir, Santa Clara, CA. 
The AV was making a right turn along the Kingsbury Cir, traveling at 16 mph. Due to an inaccurate map version downloaded on the AV 
causing the AV to drive close to the parked vehicles on the side of the street, the safety driver disengaged the AV. After disengagement, the 
right side sensor pod of the AV made contact with the left side rear view mirror of a passenger vehicle parked on the side of the Kingsbury 
Cir. At the time of the impact, the AV's Level 4 ADS was not engaged and the safety driver was operating the AV in manual mode. Both 
vehicles sustained minor damage.
Print
Clear Form
